name: Salesloft API
what_it_does: Provides programmatic access to Salesloft's sales engagement platform for managing cadences, prospects, activities, calls, and CRM synchronization workflows.
use_cases: Enroll prospects into cadences automatically when a lead is created or stage-changes in a CRM
Retrieve activity feed (emails sent, calls logged, meetings booked) to update external analytics systems
Create and update people records with enriched data from external sources before outreach begins
Pause or remove prospects from active cadences when a deal closes or a contact opts out
Pull cadence performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, step conversion) to optimize sequence templates
not_for: Sending bulk cold email outside of Salesloft cadences — the API respects platform sending limits and compliance rules
Teams not already using Salesloft as their primary sales engagement platform
Real-time streaming of activity events without implementing webhook infrastructure
best_when: An agent needs to orchestrate prospect enrollment, cadence management, or activity sync as part of a revenue automation pipeline where Salesloft is the system of record.
avoid_when: You need a lightweight email-only outreach tool; Salesloft's complexity and cost are overkill for simple email sequencing use cases.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-level access; client credentials available for service accounts. Access tokens expire in 2 hours. Scopes map to resource types (people, cadences, activities).

pricing.paid_tiers: API access included with Salesloft Essentials, Advanced, and Premier plans. Pricing is per-seat, sales-negotiated, typically $100-200/seat/month.
pricing.notes: No sandbox or free tier for API evaluation. Development access requires an active subscription or a partner sandbox.

performance.rate_limits: 600 requests per minute per OAuth token; bulk endpoints have lower limits. Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Remaining) included in responses.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors return structured JSON with status code and message; validation errors include field-level details. Rate limit responses include reset timestamps.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No explicit idempotency keys; duplicate person creation is prevented by email uniqueness but cadence enrollments can be duplicated if not checked first.
known_agent_gotchas: Enrolling a person in a cadence that they're already active in returns a silent success rather than an error — agents must check enrollment status first
OAuth tokens are per-user; agents acting on behalf of multiple reps need multiple tokens or a service account with broad permissions
Webhook delivery is not guaranteed; missed events require polling to reconcile state
The people API deduplicates on email address, but updating a person's email can silently merge records in unexpected ways
Pagination uses page-number style which can produce inconsistent results if records are added or deleted mid-pagination

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth2 with per-user token isolation is appropriate for sales data. SOC2 Type II certified. Email content in activity payloads may contain sensitive business information.
